case_title: LITKE EDWARD VS BAYVIEW FEDERAL SAVINGS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $58.02 FILED BY LITKE EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW FEDERAL SAVINGS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
